title: I Tried to Break Barron's Bound
description: Stress-testing Barron's bound across seven targets, five activations, and three optimizers.
author: Sidharth Padmanabhan

title: Measuring Barron's Constant: Putting a 1993 Approximation Theorem on a GPU
description: Measuring how much of Barron's 1993 approximation bound a trained network actually uses.
author: Sidharth Padmanabhan
